## What changed?

Describe the change in one or two sentences.

## Why does it matter?

Explain how this improves the repository for readers, contributors, or researchers.

## Type of change

- [ ] Source curation
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Navigation / structure
- [ ] Historical / archival addition
- [ ] Tooling / automation

## Verification

- [ ] I checked the links I added or changed
- [ ] I kept claims proportional to the evidence available
- [ ] I updated nearby index pages when needed

## Notes

Add caveats, open questions, or follow-up work here.
